window_summary: This window tracks the recent pppscn/SmsForwarder release stream from early versions like 1.7.0 through the Kotlin-refactored v3.x series up to v3.5.0, highlighting new forwarding channels, automation features, and stability improvements.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: pppscn/SmsForwarder
Release: 1.7.0
Tag: 1.7.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2021-03-18T12:54:12Z; created_at: 2021-03-18T12:49:26Z
Release notes:
【注意】此版本去除了Android 5.x 的支持，最低支持6.0
1、新增转发到Server酱·Turbo版
2、新增转发到Telegram机器人
3、转发到webhook支持GET方式（节点改变，原配置要重新编辑）
4、修复钉钉机器人没启用加签时url拼接错误问题
5、Android8.1以下手机重启后尝试启动主界面，以便动态获取权限（修复开机自启后无法转发短信，要打开软件后才会转发短信的问题）
6、新增转发到其他手机短信
7、避免热插卡时FC
8、规则展示优化
9、获取多卡信息&获取卡槽备注优
10、新增恢复初始化配置
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the pppscn/SmsForwarder release 1.7.0, the project drops support for Android 5.x, requiring a minimum of Android 6.0. It adds forwarding to Server酱 Turbo and Telegram bots, supports GET method for webhook forwarding (requiring reconfiguration of existing setups), fixes a DingTalk bot URL concatenation bug when signing is not enabled, attempts to launch the main interface after reboot on Android 8.1 and below to dynamically obtain permissions (fixing the issue where SMS forwarding would not work after auto-start until the app is opened), adds forwarding to other phone SMS, prevents force close on hot SIM swap, optimizes rule display, improves multi-SIM information retrieval and slot remark display, and adds a restore initialization configuration option.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: pppscn/SmsForwarder
Release: 1.7.4
Tag: 1.7.4; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2021-07-15T09:12:03Z; created_at: 2021-07-15T09:06:17Z
Release notes:
PS.抱歉！本来想着攒到 1.8.0 再发个版，只是最近实在太忙了，没时间更新这个，把1.7.3之后提交的代码打个包，方便不会打包的朋友
**累计更新：**
1、修复转发企业微信群机器人碰到"被截断问题
2、转发到webhook时忽略ssl证书校验（提高自建服务端兼容性）
3、转发telegram时将 # 替换为 井，避免被当作标签
4、隐私保护，发送方设置中敏感信息(密码/token/secret等)用星号显示
5、更新友盟基础组件库
6、解决“设置页面关闭卡槽信息，同时使用默认模板时，发送消息卡槽信息仍显示” （by miaoc ）
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the pppscn/SmsForwarder release 1.7.4, the release bundles commits since 1.7.3 for users who cannot build themselves. It fixes a truncation issue when forwarding to WeCom group robot messages, ignores SSL certificate verification for webhook forwarding to improve self-hosted server compatibility, replaces '#' with '井' in Telegram forwarding to avoid tag interpretation, masks sensitive information (passwords/tokens/secrets) in sender settings with asterisks, updates the Umeng component library, and resolves an issue where SIM slot information still appeared in sent messages when the slot info setting was disabled and the default template was used.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: pppscn/SmsForwarder
Release: SmsForwarder v2.0.0 国庆版
Tag: v2.0.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2021-09-30T08:50:33Z; created_at: 2021-09-30T08:49:39Z
Release notes:
1、转发到webhook增加支持自定义post数据，并支持Json数据提交
2、增加电池优化白名单设置和权限（感谢：aoe-iu）
3、重新梳理代码 & 引入Lombok & 升级gradle版本（消灭waring）
4、Bark增加支持分组（发送方名称作为分组名称）
5、改进正则表达式匹配方式
6、内容匹配模式【不是】改为【不包含】
7、增加低电量预警，按需设置一下转发规则（不再遍历所有发送方）【号码：88888888、内容：当前剩余电量：xx%，已经到达低电量预警阈值，请及时充电！、卡槽：sim1】
8、添加飞书的webhook支持
9、自定义 Scheme（forwarder://main）用于唤起App
10、接口请求失败后延时重试5次（可配置间隔时间）
11、未接来电提醒转发（转发规则与短信相同，感谢：aoe-iu）
12、手机重启后，主动初始化设置。（解决部分情况下，手机重启后无法转发，必须打开app问题，感谢：aoe-iu）
13、多语言支持（目前：中文、英文，感谢：malsony）
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the pppscn/SmsForwarder release v2.0.0 (National Day edition), the release adds custom POST data support and JSON submission for webhook forwarding, adds battery optimization whitelist settings and permissions, refactors code with Lombok and upgrades Gradle, adds group support for Bark (using sender name as group name), improves regex matching, changes content matching mode from 'is not' to 'does not contain', adds low battery alert (with a dedicated forwarding rule using number 88888888 and specific content), adds Feishu webhook support, adds a custom URL scheme (forwarder://main) to launch the app, adds delayed retry up to 5 times on interface request failure (configurable interval), adds missed call reminder forwarding (same rules as SMS), proactively initializes settings after phone reboot to fix forwarding failures without opening the app, and adds multi-language support (Chinese and English).

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the pppscn/SmsForwarder release v2.2.0, the release adds the ability to listen for notifications from other apps and forward them based on rules, fixes a Telegram phone number loss issue, optimizes call forwarding to include SIM slot information, optimizes Telegram forwarding to support custom bot addresses (reusing the ApiToken field, starting with http), allows custom templates when adding forwarding rules (leaving it empty uses the global setting), fixes a null pointer bug in Bark push message icon specification, adds default off switches for SMS, call, and app forwarding in general settings, optimizes the ActionBar popup menu position, adds a feature to get a list of all apps (for easy copying of app package names), adds forwarding to PushPlus, adds a help document (linking to Gitee wiki), optimizes to not show in recent tasks list (to aid keep-alive), restores compatibility with Android 5.x, and starts using GitHub Actions for online compilation and release.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the pppscn/SmsForwarder release v2.3.0 (Double 12 Carnival edition), the release adds Telegram forwarding via SOCKS5/HTTP proxy, optimizes the about page to attempt jumping to the system auto-start settings when enabling auto-start, restricts installation to internal storage only to prevent auto-start failure (to be verified), fixes a bug where multiple phone numbers separated by semicolons were invalid for forwarding to other phones, optimizes logging with an intermediate state and records interface request retry logs, optimizes battery status monitoring (low battery warning thresholds, battery status changes), adds support for configuring regex replacement content on forwarding rules, upgrades the XUpdate component version, prevents duplicate processing of missed call broadcasts for the same SIM slot within the same second (some models receive two broadcasts), and fixes an issue with multiple WeCom app access tokens coexisting.

chunks.title: SmsForwarder v2.4.0 新春贺岁暨周年庆版
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: pppscn/SmsForwarder
Release: SmsForwarder v2.4.0 新春贺岁暨周年庆版
Tag: v2.4.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2022-01-30T12:17:01Z; created_at: 2022-01-30T12:10:03Z
Release notes:
### 重要更新：
* 新增：Gotify发送通道（自主推送通知服务）
* 优化：一键克隆机制优化，提高成功率
* 新增：smshub主被动模式 by xingxichen
* 优化：界面布局 & 用户体验优化
* 优化：关闭代码混淆（minifyEnabled=false），避免代码混淆后一些莫名其妙的问题，因此APK包有所变大
### 常规更新：
* 修复：多重匹配中”正则匹配“bug
* 优化：飞书使用Card发送通知消息 by xiao0yy
* 新增：支持一键克隆单条转发规则（长按弹出对话框）
* 新增：多重匹配增加匹配字段——通知标题、卡槽信息
* 新增：自定义模板 新增 {{通知标题}} 变量（APP通知有效，取值等同{{卡槽信息}}）
* 新增：允许开启自动关闭通知（单条通知处理完毕后自动关闭，避免多条通知堆叠）
* 新增：隐私政策对话框（合规化，同意后才能使用软件、未同意隐私协议前不进行任何组件初始化）
* 优化：邮件发送支持多个收件人（以半角逗号,分隔）
* 新增：Telegram允许指定请求方式(POST/GET) by pickmefly
* 优化：自定义模板（在焦点位置插入标签） by Nacll
* 优化：更换SIM卡后，卡槽信息自动刷新 by Nacll
* 新增：手动重发发送失败的消息 by Nacll
* 优化：敏感信息输入框增加明文/密文切换、清除按钮（明文状态下可粘贴）
* 新增：发送通道新增是否启用状态
* 优化：发送通道必填字段校验与界面优化
* 新增：pushplus增加标题模板
* 优化：发送失败重试简化配置、机制优化（手动请求时不重试）
* 新增：转发规则新增是否启用状态
* 新增：异常捕获类，记录crash日志
* 优化：移除RxJava
* 新增：OkHttp重试拦截器、设置超时时间为5秒
* 优化：电量预警增加是否持续通知开关
* 新增：Webhook的GET形式支持webParams【例如：PushDeer】
* 整理：英文语言包&界面布局微调 by malsony
* 优化：StepBar 控件（新手按1234步骤进行配置，已设置过则点亮）
* 精简：不需要获取 mImei 和 mImsi，避免异常
* 修复：来电转发的卡槽信息不准确（异常处理：获取卡槽失败时，默认为卡槽1）、转发文本标明通话类型：1.呼入 2.呼出 3.未接
* 优化：bark推送新增标题模板、时效性、声音、角标、链接设置项（兼容旧的配置）
* 优化：增加ABI配置（按CPU架构分别打包）
* 精简：删除不必要的资源文件、压缩图片资源
* 优化：细化权限请求判断
* 优化：GitHub Action 打包脚本（按CPU架构分别发包）
* 精简：替换FloatingActionButton组件
### APK版本说明：
* universal: 通用版（不在乎安装包大小/懒得选就用这个版本，包含以下3种CPU架构so）
* armeabi-v7a: 32位ARM设备（备用机首选）
* arm64-v8a: 64位ARM设备（主流旗舰机）
* x86: 32位Intel设备
### 2022-02-02 更新：
* 修复：兼容旧版本保存的telegram配置
* 优化：APP通知默认不开启”自动消除通知“功能
* 优化：隐私协议授权弹窗自适应分辨率（避免老年人模式下点不到按钮）
* 优化：通用设置界面微调（避免换行）
* 修复：转发通话记录开关状态保存失效
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the pppscn/SmsForwarder release v2.4.0 (Spring Festival and Anniversary edition), the release adds a Gotify sending channel, optimizes the one-click clone mechanism for higher success rate, adds SMSHub active/passive modes, optimizes UI layout and user experience, disables code minification to avoid mysterious issues (increasing APK size), fixes a regex matching bug in multi-match, optimizes Feishu to send notifications using Cards, adds one-click clone for a single forwarding rule (long press dialog), adds notification title and SIM slot info as multi-match fields, adds a {{notification title}} template variable (valid for app notifications, same value as {{SIM slot info}}), allows automatic closing of notifications after processing to avoid stacking, adds a privacy policy dialog for compliance (must agree before using the app, no component initialization before agreement), supports multiple recipients for email (comma separated), allows specifying request method (POST/GET) for Telegram, optimizes custom template tag insertion at focus position, auto-refreshes SIM slot info after SIM change, adds manual resend of failed messages, adds show/hide toggle and clear button for sensitive info input fields (paste in plaintext mode), adds enable/disable status for sending channels, optimizes required field validation and UI for sending channels, adds a title template for PushPlus, simplifies retry configuration and mechanism for send failures (no retry on manual request), adds enable/disable status for forwarding rules, adds an exception capture class to record crash logs, removes RxJava, adds OkHttp retry interceptor and sets timeout to 5 seconds, adds a persistent notification switch for battery alerts, supports webParams for webhook GET form (e.g., PushDeer), organizes English language pack and UI layout, optimizes StepBar control (guides new users through steps 1-4, lit if already configured), removes unnecessary mImei and mImsi retrieval to avoid exceptions, fixes inaccurate SIM slot info for call forwarding (defaults to slot 1 on failure) and indicates call type (1. incoming, 2. outgoing, 3. missed), adds title template, expiration, sound, badge, and link settings for Bark push (backward compatible), adds ABI configuration to package by CPU architecture, removes unnecessary resource files and compresses images, refines permission request logic, optimizes GitHub Action packaging script to build per CPU architecture, and replaces the FloatingActionButton component.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the pppscn/SmsForwarder release v2.4.2 (Valentine's Day edition), the release optimizes UI and adapts to dark mode, fixes an SMS forwarding error related to targeting S+ (version 31 and above) requiring FLAG_IMMUTABLE, adds an important first-use reminder for new users, streamlines Gradle dependencies (slimming plan), optimizes the SMS local server mode, fixes invalid URL parameters for the Bark sending channel, adds a top-right menu on the 1234 steps page, adapts ClearEditText for ultra-low resolution, makes Gotify ignore HTTPS certificates, checks for 'send SMS' permission when adding an SMS sending channel, reduces popup prompts when closing page help, removes the 'send SMS' permission check from the SMS forwarding master switch, and fixes the lack of battery optimization ignore on Android 6.0 and below.

chunks.title: SmsForwarder v2.4.3
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: pppscn/SmsForwarder
Release: SmsForwarder v2.4.3
Tag: v2.4.3; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2022-02-25T01:51:42Z; created_at: 2022-02-25T01:44:31Z
Release notes:
刚好赶上生日，发一版自嗨一下……
### 试验性优化：
* 优化：保活措施-播放无声音乐让后台一直运行（可能比较耗电，按需启用）
* 优化：保活措施-1像素透明Activity保活（使进程的优先级在屏幕锁屏时间由4提升为最高优先级1）
* 优化：兼容OV系手机短信广播（可以不用在通过APP通知转发了）
### 常规更新：
* 优化：多重匹配中的正则匹配改成部分匹配（pattern.matcher）
* 修复：PushPlus标题模板无效
* 优化：webhook发送通道的 webParams 新增可用标签
* 优化：飞书发送通道允许选择消息类型（纯文本/消息卡片）
* 优化：飞书发送通道的消息卡片允许自定义标题模板
* 优化：界面布局微调
### APK版本说明：
* universal: 通用版（不在乎安装包大小/懒得选就用这个版本，包含以下3种CPU架构so）
* armeabi-v7a: 32位ARM设备（备用机首选）
* arm64-v8a: 64位ARM设备（主流旗舰机）
* x86: 32位Intel设备（64位兼容）
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the pppscn/SmsForwarder release v2.4.3, the release experimentally optimizes keep-alive by playing silent music to keep the background running (may increase battery consumption, enable as needed) and using a 1-pixel transparent Activity to raise process priority from 4 to 1 when the screen is locked, improves compatibility with OV brand phone SMS broadcasts (no longer needing to forward via app notifications), changes multi-match regex to partial matching (pattern.matcher), fixes an invalid PushPlus title template, adds available tags for webParams in the webhook sending channel, allows selecting message type (plain text/message card) for Feishu sending channel, allows custom title template for Feishu message cards, and fine-tunes UI layout.

chunks.title: SmsForwarder v2.4.4
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: pppscn/SmsForwarder
Release: SmsForwarder v2.4.4
Tag: v2.4.4; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2022-04-04T01:54:55Z; created_at: 2022-04-04T01:48:59Z
Release notes:
大版本更新之前，先发一个小版本更新，下一个版本（2.5.0）重点改造 `主动请求(远程控制)` 功能
对暴露的api有什么想法欢迎提issue，在合法合规的前提下，酌情考虑会不会添加！
### 重点优化
* 新增：一键克隆增加离线模式（导出备份json文件到Download目录，其他机器读取文件导入）
* 优化：一键克隆机制优化（替换db文件→操作现有db）
* 新增：Webhook发送通道支持设置Header (#128)
* 优化：Email发送通道简化配置（常见邮箱不需要填写smtp信息）
### 常规优化
* 新增：仅锁屏状态转发APP通知开关
* 新增：定时发布 每夜构建 版本（北京时间：23:30）
* 新增：定时推送电池状态 (#131)
* 修复：手动重发消息中UTC时间未转换本地时间 (#122)
* 优化：抽取电池状态信息工具类
* 新增：定时推送电池状态 (#121)
* 优化：内嵌 WebView 打开使用帮助
* 优化：界面微调（增加输入框提示等）
* 修复：Bark通道转发规则正则导致转发失败（去除对标题的正则替换）
### APK版本说明：
* universal: 通用版（不在乎安装包大小/懒得选就用这个版本，包含以下3种CPU架构so）
* armeabi-v7a: 32位ARM设备（备用机首选）
* arm64-v8a: 64位ARM设备（主流旗舰机）
* x86: 32位Intel设备（64位兼容）
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the pppscn/SmsForwarder release v2.4.4, the release adds an offline mode for one-click clone (export backup JSON file to Download directory, import on other devices), optimizes the one-click clone mechanism (replacing db file -> operating on existing db), adds support for setting headers in the Webhook sending channel, simplifies email sending channel configuration (common email providers do not need SMTP info), adds a switch to forward app notifications only when the screen is locked, adds scheduled nightly builds (Beijing time 23:30), adds scheduled battery status push, fixes UTC time not converted to local time in manual resend messages, extracts a battery status utility class, embeds WebView for help, fine-tunes UI (adds input hints, etc.), and fixes a Bark channel forwarding failure caused by regex on the title (removes regex replacement on title).

chunks.title: SmsForwarder v3.0.0 Kotlin全新重构版
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: pppscn/SmsForwarder
Release: SmsForwarder v3.0.0 Kotlin全新重构版
Tag: v3.0.0; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2022-06-09T05:41:36Z; created_at: 2022-06-09T02:03:28Z
Release notes:
【注意】v3.x版本是全新重构开发，可能一开始并不稳定，建议升级前先做好数据备份！（一键克隆离线导出）
### 更新日志
* 重构：采用 Kotlin 全新重构（不是迁移代码）
* 重构：全新的界面 XUI 实现（略微提升点前端美感）
* 重构：全新的 HttpServer 实现（采用 AndServer，目前有6个API）
* 新增：增加 Frpc 支持内网穿透（按需下载 FrpcLib 动态库支持）
* 新增：主动控制·客户端（界面直接远程发短信等）
* 新增：保活措施 Cactus（双进程前台服务，JobScheduler，onePix(一像素)，WorkManager，无声音乐）
* 优化：适配 Android 4.4 ~ 12.0
* 优化：舍弃 emailkit 依赖，直接基于 android-mail 重写
* 优化：自动过滤指定时间内的重复消息
* 修复：v2.x 的 issue
* 精简：一些不必要的功能（含尚未迁移的小功能）
### APK版本说明：
* universal: 通用版（不在乎安装包大小/懒得选就用这个版本，包含以下3种CPU架构so）
* armeabi-v7a: 32位ARM设备（备用机首选）
* arm64-v8a: 64位ARM设备（主流旗舰机）
* x86: 32位Intel设备
* x86_64: 64/32位Intel设备
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the pppscn/SmsForwarder release v3.0.0 (Kotlin full rewrite edition), the project is completely rewritten in Kotlin (not a code migration), features a new UI using XUI, a new HttpServer implementation using AndServer with 6 APIs, adds Frpc support for intranet penetration (requires downloading FrpcLib dynamic library), adds an active control client (remote SMS sending via interface), adds Cactus keep-alive measures (dual-process foreground service, JobScheduler, onePix, WorkManager, silent music), optimizes compatibility with Android 4.4 to 12.0, drops emailkit dependency and rewrites email based on android-mail, automatically filters duplicate messages within a specified time, fixes v2.x issues, and removes some unnecessary features (including small features not yet migrated).

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the pppscn/SmsForwarder release v3.0.4 (Kotlin full rewrite edition), the release includes all features of v3.0.3 and additionally optimizes the rule edit to not show the installed app dropdown when async app info fetch is off, allows entering the active control client -> one-click new phone -> offline mode without filling in the server address, fixes a force close when testing TG/Webhook sending channels due to Toast on a child thread, fixes transcoding failure when inserting {{receive time}} in sender nickname (Nested Group), optimizes email subject and sender nickname by replacing colons and newlines with hyphens, replaces domain names for online upgrade and FrpcLib download URLs, adds service address history in the active control client (automatically added after a successful test), relaxes the phone number length limit to 20 digits for sending SMS in the active control client (for SMS platform numbers), improves compatibility of remote call log and contact query in the active control client (compatible with HarmonyOS 2.0), and adds a QQ channel entry on the about page.

---

* 新增：按需启用Cactus增强保活措施的开关【开启后可能会增加耗电】 (v3.0.3)

* 整理：替换 在线升级 & FrpcLib下载 URL的域名 (v3.0.4)
* 新增：主动控制·客户端增加服务地址历史记录（测试接口通过后自动加入） (v3.0.4)

* 新增：主动控制·客户端 -> 一键换新机 支持导出导入Frpc配置 (v3.0.5)
* 优化：FrpcLib下载流程（增加确认对话框） (v3.0.5)
* 新增：免打扰(禁用转发)时间段 (v3.0.5)
* 修复：钉钉群机器人不填写加签密钥时报错（Empty key） (v3.0.5)
### APK版本说明：
* universal: 通用版（不在乎安装包大小/懒得选就用这个版本，包含以下3种CPU架构so）
* armeabi-v7a: 32位ARM设备（备用机首选）
* arm64-v8a: 64位ARM设备（主流旗舰机）
* x86: 32位Intel设备
* x86_64: 64/32位Intel设备
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the pppscn/SmsForwarder release v3.0.5 (Kotlin full rewrite edition), the release includes all features of v3.0.4 and additionally optimizes the webhook sending channel to support HTTP basic authentication, optimizes WeCom app channel to log errors when access_token retrieval fails, optimizes SMS sending channel to log errors when permission is not granted or when enabled only without network, fixes a bug where email recipient addresses did not support comma separation (now supports comma/semicolon), optimizes testing of sending channels/forwarding rules by running in a child thread with exception capture, optimizes Telegram proxy hostname to support domain resolution, adds SIM slot info and remarks to the remote config query interface, fixes Telegram Socks5 user password authentication, optimizes webhook webParams to no longer require the [msg] tag when non-empty, optimizes Bark/Gotify to support HTTP basic authentication, supports adding \n in regex replacement for manual line breaks, optimizes webhook channel to replace [timestamp]/[sign] tags in webParams during POST, adds export/import of Frpc configuration in one-click new phone, optimizes FrpcLib download flow with a confirmation dialog, adds a do-not-disturb (disable forwarding) time period, and fixes an error when DingTalk group robot does not fill in the signing key (Empty key).

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the pppscn/SmsForwarder release v3.0.7 (Kotlin full rewrite edition, 7x24 Ops Festival edition), the release includes all features of v3.0.6 and additionally optimizes Android 4.4 compatibility, adds version_code and version_name fields to the /config/query interface, upgrades frpclib to v0.44.0, adds a DingTalk enterprise internal robot sending channel (supports private messaging), fixes an error when editing forwarding rules due to channel name being too long (setSpan ends beyond length 20), and optimizes Bark/Gotify channels to ignore HTTPS certificates (improving self-hosted server compatibility).

Repository: pppscn/SmsForwarder Release: SmsForwarder v3.0.8 Kotlin全新重构版 Tag: v3.0.8; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2022-08-15T05:50:18Z; created_at: 2022-08-15T05:31:18Z Release notes: 日本无条件投降77周年，勿忘历史，我辈自强！ --- ### 【注意】 * v3.x版本是全新重构开发，可能一开始并不稳定，建议升级前先做好数据备份！（客户端>一键换新机>离线模式>导出） * 从2.x升级上来耗电异常的，尝试全新安装后导入配置 ### 更新日志 - 修复：短信内容包含“<"字符时，用tg转发失败 #205 - 优化：随身WiFi断电重启后frpc启动不成功 #199 - 新增：HttpServer允许自主指定Web客户端目录（/sdcard/Download/目录下） #191 - 优化：主动控制·客户端的历史列表增加设备名称、远程发短信增加卡槽备注 #201 - 新增：企微应用消息允许指定部门和指定标签 - 修复：钉钉企业内机器人发送通道不能转发bug（”转发中“） - 升级：gradle依赖库版本 - 修复：Android 5.0 以下TLS 版本过低导致 Okhttp https 握手失败（最高支持TLSv1.2） #197 - 优化：倒计时Button在处理结束时提前结束 - 优化：英文系统的界面布局微调 - 优化：消灭任何可能导致内存泄露的代码（长期跟踪的改造点） - 升级：XXPermissions 至 v15.0 （修复 Android 12 内存泄漏问题） - 升级：XUI解决xtoast内存泄漏问题 - 升级：androidx.room 版本到 2.4.3 - 升级：解决XUpdate可能出现的空指针问题 - 优化：电子邮箱发送通道自动替换正文中的`\n`为`
`(邮件正文是html) - 修复：gotify insert bug (#193) - 修复：远程查通话和远程查短信关键字搜索时分页bug - 新增：主动控制增加远程WOL功能（用于远程唤醒同一个局域网其他设备） #190 - 优化：发送通道企微应用消息增加限制：@all或指定成员（避免82001错误） ### APK版本说明： * universal: 通用版（不在乎安装包大小/懒得选就用这个版本，包含以下4种CPU架构so） * armeabi-v7a: 32位ARM设备（备用机首选） * arm64-v8a: 64位ARM设备（主流旗舰机） * x86: 32位Intel设备 * x86_64: 64/32位Intel设备
chunks.memory_unit_text:
In the pppscn/SmsForwarder release v3.0.8 (Kotlin full rewrite edition), the release fixes an issue where SMS content containing '<' fails to forward via Telegram, optimizes Frpc startup failure after portable WiFi power cycle, adds the ability for HttpServer to specify a custom web client directory, optimizes the active control client history list to show device name and SIM slot remarks for remote SMS, adds the ability for WeCom app messages to specify departments and tags, fixes a bug where the DingTalk enterprise internal robot sending channel could not forward (stuck on 'forwarding'), upgrades Gradle dependency versions, fixes an issue where Android 5.0 and below had TLS version too low causing OkHttp HTTPS handshake failure (max supported TLSv1.2), optimizes countdown button to end early when processing finishes, fine-tunes UI layout for English systems, eliminates potential memory leak code, upgrades XXPermissions to v15.0 (fixes Android 12 memory leak), upgrades XUI to fix xtoast memory leak, upgrades androidx.room to 2.4.3, fixes potential null pointer in XUpdate, optimizes email sending channel to auto-replace \n with
in body (HTML email), fixes a Gotify insert bug, fixes pagination bugs in remote call log and SMS keyword search, adds remote Wake-on-LAN (WOL) functionality in active control, and optimizes WeCom app message sending channel to limit @all or specify members (to avoid 82001 error).

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the pppscn/SmsForwarder release v3.0.9 (77th Anniversary of Victory edition), the release optimizes HttpServer MIME type support for js, css, and icon on low Android versions (fixing blank web client pages), adds incoming call alert (rings immediately, no SIM slot info), organizes Frpc client configuration examples to match wiki examples, adds the ability to insert {{source number}} tag in the recipient phone field of the SMS sending channel for auto-reply (SMS/call scenarios), optimizes Telegram sending channel to escape '<', '>', '&', '"' characters in original SMS content only for POST requests (regex replacement unaffected), enables TLS 1.3 support for Android 4.4 (fixing certificate errors), adds a Feishu enterprise app sending channel, adds a test notification title, and fixes a regex issue in forwarding rules under English locale.

* 新增：`HttpServer`请求/应答报文进行`国密SM4`对称加密传输 【配套`SmsF`微信小程序】

* 优化：自动消除通知仅消除已匹配的通知 #204（临时方案，重复查询换取准确性）
* 修复：通话转发卡槽信息识别错误
* 精简：去掉美团多渠道打包
* 升级：权限请求框架 XXPermissions
* 修复：极端情况下Gson().fromJson爆空指针错误 #207
* 修复：通过转发日志中重新发送短信时，{{接收时间}}错误 #218
### APK版本说明：
* universal: 通用版（不在乎安装包大小/懒得选就用这个版本，包含以下4种CPU架构so）
* armeabi-v7a: 32位ARM设备（备用机首选）
* arm64-v8a: 64位ARM设备（主流旗舰机）
* x86: 32位Intel设备
* x86_64: 64/32位Intel设备
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the pppscn/SmsForwarder release v3.1.0 (1024 Programmer's Day edition), the release adds a solar code for the WeChat mini program client, adds SM4 symmetric encryption for HttpServer request/response messages (supporting the SmsF WeChat mini program), adds RSA asymmetric encryption for HttpServer request/response messages, upgrades Gradle and dependencies, fixes an issue where phone numbers with country codes could not be used for remote SMS sending, allows customizing the time tolerance between client and server to prevent replay attacks, improves compatibility of multi-parameter separation in sending channels, supports URL Scheme for Bark message links, improves URL validation to support IPv6 addresses, updates examples for app notification forwarding multi-match rules, adds PUT/PATCH request methods for the webhook sending channel, optimizes automatic update checks to only occur on WiFi, adds automatic deletion of forwarding records older than N days (0=disabled, triggered on battery change), optimizes automatic notification dismissal to only dismiss matched notifications (temporary solution, trades repeated queries for accuracy), fixes call forwarding SIM slot info recognition error, removes Meituan multi-channel packaging, upgrades the XXPermissions permission request framework, fixes an extreme case null pointer error in Gson().fromJson, and fixes an incorrect {{receive time}} when resending SMS from the forwarding log.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the pppscn/SmsForwarder release v3.2.0 (2nd Anniversary edition), the release adds SMS commands (toggle functions based on SMS commands), adds network status change monitoring (app notification forwarding, package name 77777777), adds remote contact editing (convenient for adding contacts for elderly), adds remote phone location query (to find phone/prevent loss), adds a Socket sending channel (supporting MQTT/TCP/UDP protocols), adds a URL Scheme sending channel (for cross-app data transfer), adds automatic dismissal of extra app notifications, optimizes SIM slot info retrieval for SMS/call forwarding (self-annotate SIM slot SubId mapping), optimizes call forwarding logic and adds reminder types (1. incoming hangup, 2. outgoing hangup, 3. missed call, 4. incoming alert, 5. incoming answered, 6. outgoing dialed), allows a single forwarding rule to bind multiple sending channels with execution logic (execute all/stop on failure/stop on success), optimizes forwarding log list to show original messages and aggregate forwarding logs (one-to-many), optimizes async loading of installed app info list, enables 1-second deduplication by default for battery status and network monitoring when dedup is off, uses BatteryReceiver to guard auto-started Frpc (experimental), fixes inability to grant notification permission on Android 13, fixes configuration loading failure on auto-start after reboot, fixes forwarding message traversal skipping disabled channels, downgrades Android Gradle plugin version for 4.4 compatibility, upgrades andserver to 2.1.12 (speeds up web upload/download), upgrades frpclib to v0.47.0, and upgrades androidx components and Kotlin version.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the pppscn/SmsForwarder release v3.3.0 (3rd Anniversary edition), the release adds automatic tasks/shortcut commands with trigger conditions: scheduled tasks, arriving/leaving a location, SIM slot status change (deprecates 66666666), network status change (deprecates 77777777), battery level/charging status change (deprecates 88888888), screen lock/unlock; and execution actions: send SMS, push notification, clear logs, general settings, start/stop Frpc, start/stop HttpServer, start/stop rules, start/stop channels. It also adds support for @members in WeCom group robot text messages, adds call type as a matching field in call forwarding rules and a {{call type}} template tag, rewrites the Log class to write logs to files for troubleshooting, adds multi-language switching settings, adds Traditional Chinese language pack (machine translated), adds UID condition for app notification forwarding to distinguish dual apps (requires Android Q+), adds a {{location info}} template tag, adds current WiFi name (SSID)/mobile data SIM slot to network status change notifications, adds SMS sending function to SMS commands, adds SMS commands to turn WiFi on/off (experimental), adds SMS commands smsf#system#reboot and smsf#system#shutdown (experimental, root only), adds custom time format support for the [receive_time] tag in webParams, adds IPv6 retrieval to network status monitoring notifications, allows forwarding rules to set do-not-disturb time periods, adds channel name to sending channel test content, adds {{current time}} tag, adds DingTalk group robot markdown format support, adds DingTalk group robot @DingTalk ID/overseas phone number support, adds Bark push encryption support, records crash logs, optimizes Feishu group robot and enterprise app to support custom message card templates, optimizes Feishu enterprise app to specify message recipient ID type, hides keys by default in active control server/client, uses vector graphics on Android 4.4, optimizes request retry mechanism (retries even without network, fixes delay unit error), optimizes MainActivity content filling to avoid loading multiple fragments at once and improve startup speed and stability, beautifies left slide menu and TabBar, only auto-checks for updates on startup when enabled and network available, only fetches installed app list when the master switch is on, replaces Looper.loop() Toast with LiveEventBus, adds UID to app list and {{UID}} template tag for app notifications, optimizes network status monitoring for multi-SIM switching issues, avoids Room main thread query cache, cleans cache when auto-deleting old forwarding records, allows custom API address for WeCom app sending channel (to bypass IP whitelist via reverse proxy), removes kmnkt dependency and refactors SocketUtils, adds success response keyword for Webhook channel (empty means HTTP 200 is success), adds support for enterprise-specific DingTalk (fill in full Webhook address), prompts for manage all files permission when selecting web client directory, optimizes remote WOL functionality, supports Markdown format for WeCom group robot sending channel, improves input method for retry interval on request failure, removes restrictions on Bark message links, avoids potential null pointer crash on auto-start service after reboot on some models, optimizes one-click new phone export/import of general settings, removes SIM slot primary key (SubId) field from default app notification forwarding template, removes phone number length detection limit for client SMS sending, fixes incompatibility of instr() function on some Android 4.4 systems (portable WiFi), fixes inability to connect to smtp.gmail.com port 587, fixes MQTT connection but not working issue, fixes not jumping to specific notification permission settings page, fixes invalid click on notification title button in app forwarding rule edit, fixes key-value error in CactusSave SharedPreferences, fixes incorrect URL validation regex, fixes inability to auto-dismiss notifications, fixes incorrect {{receive time}} when retrying/resending from forwarding log (uses current time), upgrades frpclib to v0.54.0 (supports latest XTCP), upgrades XUI framework, upgrades XUpdate dependency, upgrades CodeView & XXPermissions dependency libraries, fine-tunes UI and removes infrequently used settings, and organizes code review and removes useless resources.

questions.query_text: Across the pppscn/SmsForwarder releases, how does the keep-alive approach in v2.4.3 differ from the keep-alive approach in v3.0.0?

options.text: v2.4.3 uses silent music and a 1-pixel transparent Activity, while v3.0.0 introduces a comprehensive Cactus system with dual-process foreground service, JobScheduler, onePix, WorkManager, and silent music.
v2.4.3 introduces Cactus, while v3.0.0 removes all keep-alive measures.

v2.4.3 uses WorkManager, while v3.0.0 uses only a foreground service.
